assertions.assertion: Output must address ownership ambiguity explicitly
assertions.evidence: "Establish a clear ownership model: Identify a single point of contact or team lead for each CI system (CircleCI and GitHub Actions) to ensure both systems are being used consistently and correctly."

assertions.assertion: Output must mention both CI systems by name (CircleCI and GitHub Actions)
assertions.evidence: "Establish a clear ownership model: Identify a single point of contact or team lead for each CI system (CircleCI and GitHub Actions) to ensure both systems are being used consistently and correctly."

assertions.assertion: Output must give at least one short-term action item that is actionable despite the chaos
assertions.evidence: "Investigate the CircleCI and GitHub Actions setup further to understand which system is being used more widely and if there's any overlap between the two."

assertions.assertion: Output must score Ownership & culture at 2/5 or lower
assertions.evidence: "Team size and composition: With only 7 active engineers, the team might be feeling understaffed, which could impact productivity and morale. Code review: While officially required, the practice of skipping code reviews when something is "urgent" might be contributing to quality issues and a lack of cohesion in the codebase."

assertions.assertion: Output must not recommend a full team reorganisation
